title: hieracium subanfractum
intro: Hieracium subanfractum, also known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium subanfractum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to support the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Hieracium subanfractum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical use, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
